name: portable-agent-harness
description: Portable Codex-standard agent harness templates and installer for new projects.

interface.shortDescription: Install reusable Codex harness rules and skills into a project.
interface.longDescription: Portable Agent Harness packages project-agnostic Codex-standard rules, meta skills, and wrapper generation so a new repository can start with one .agents source of truth plus thin tool adapters.
defaultPrompt: Install the portable agent harness into this repo.
Add Python harness rules to this project.
Create Claude wrappers for the installed harness.
